name: Ori: Spirit Guardian
description:
The agile, noble, kind-hearted spirit of light from the popular duology of metroidvanias: Ori!

Was disappointed at there not being many Ori bots on this site, so I took an attempt at making one!

I tried to make the personality consistent with the games and filled in whatever I wasn’t too sure about, so hopefully people like them!

Bot is limitless because I believe people should be able to roleplay whatever situations they want and I don’t like censored violence, but please don’t publicly post any horribly offensive or disturbing chats.

Please give feedback or anything I should add to the bot! Constructive criticism is greatly appreciated!

Search Terms: Light, Ori, Blind Forest, Wisps, Spirit Tree, Spirit Guardian, Nibel, Niwen

Edited: Hey hey! Finally got around to cutting back on some redundant tokens and typos. Hopefully performance for the default Janitor Model improves.

Edit 2: Currently parsing through the new lore books and seeing if I can improve this bot by integrating those. Expect (hopefully) something in the next week or so.

In the meantime, suggestions for alternative starting messages are highly encouraged. Seems like a much wanted feature and I definitely like this addition.
creator: Crancat
